name: Mobile Dimensional Clay Shelf
runtimeIntent: Native mobile companion and web/PWA proof surfaces; not a desktop Workshop clone.

format.texturePolicy: No external texture paths in alpha mobile GLB assets.
format.compressionPolicy: Meshopt/KTX2 may be added when the mobile runtime supports it; do not add decode cost before runtime proof.

assets.purpose: First dimensional mobile bot preview for identity, equipped parts, pairing, and recent proof states.

notes: This shelf is preparation only; mobile remains after the Windows/native loop is dependable.
Generated GLB assets should stay small, named, matte, and inspectable.
When hand-sculpted Blender assets arrive, export clean GLB files into this same contract and keep the validator passing.
